boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: observability suppression.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Open dependency blocks execution; exact authority match unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current incident exception and monitoring owner match remains unresolved.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record and policy both require the exact boundary to be closed by current source records before any observability suppression or privileged-admin execution. The unresolved incident exception and monitoring owner match leaves the boundary open, so the correct disposition is ESCALATE.
open_blockers: current incident exception and monitoring owner match
